title: pelargonium × pyrethrifolium
intro: Pelargonium × pyrethrifolium, a hybrid of the pelargonium and pyrethrum plant species, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Geraniaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, and its health benefits include reducing fever, soothing coughs, and aiding in wound healing. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium × pyrethrifolium include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
